text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Um, Rudolf? What do you think about 
sleeping on the floor on a futon?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Well we do have some available in 
the dorms. Now that I think about it, 
the linen storage room could use some 
more ventilation for hygienic purposes.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so nothing about being "floored" 
by the health benefits? Too bad…

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about that. Anyways, Prez. 
Take a look at this cell phone.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Actually, It's been going off in silent mode 
for a while now, but I keep ignoring it.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Guh. Nothing about how I'm "phoning it in" 
with my connections? This might be trickier 
than I thought…

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, I have to go now. I have a meeting
with Teio, so I mustn't… Heh. I mustn't 
"overstay, yo." Hehe…

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
…Did Teio just score without even 
being here? Well, our game to see who 
can get her to say a pun first ends in 
a draw. We'll try again next time.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Aww, Teio's just too good! But next time, 
I'll win this! Then I'll tell Teio all about it!
